print toscalar(indicatorEventDetailsCount);

# User Profile Risk Score Received
# User Profile Location Received
# User Profile App Received

# User Profile Device Received

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL | project bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), event_type
| union CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL | project bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), event_type
| union CitrixAnalytics_indicatorEventDetails_V1_CL | project bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), event_type
| union CitrixAnalytics_riskScoreChange_V1_CL | project bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), event_type
| union CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL | project bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), event_type
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), event_type
content.title: Citrix Analytics Events Received (over time)

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL
| where data_source == "{dataSource}"
| where indicator_category == "{riskIndicatorCategory}"
| where entity_type == "{entityType}"
| where indicator_type == "{riskIndicatorType}"
| where indicator_name == "{riskIndicator}"
| project TimeGenerated, data_source, indicator_category, indicator_name, entity_id, entity_type, severity, risk_probability, indicator_uuid
content.title: Risk Indicator (History)

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_indicatorEventDetails_V1_CL
| where indicator_uuid == '{indicator_uuid}'
content.title: Risk Indicator Event Details

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| where cur_riskscore >= 65
| where cur_riskscore <= 100
| where entity_type == 'user'
| summarize count()
content.title: High Risk Users

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| where cur_riskscore >= 35
| where cur_riskscore <= 64
| where entity_type == 'user'
| summarize count()
content.title: Medium Risk Users

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| where cur_riskscore >= 1
| where cur_riskscore <= 34
| where entity_type == 'user'
| summarize count()
content.title: Low Risk Users

content.query:
( CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| where cur_riskscore >= 65
| where cur_riskscore <= 100
| where entity_type == 'user'
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated,1d), severity="High")
| union (CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| where cur_riskscore >= 35
| where cur_riskscore <= 64
| where entity_type == 'user'
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated,1d), severity="Medium")
| union (CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| where cur_riskscore >= 1
| where cur_riskscore <= 34
| where entity_type == 'user'
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated,1d), severity="Low")
| order by severity, TimeGenerated asc 
| render barchart
content.title: Users Risk Profile (over time)

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| join CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL on tenant_id, entity_id
| summarize count() by entity_id, indicator_category, cur_riskscore
| evaluate pivot(indicator_category)
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
content.title: Risky Users

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL
| where indicator_type == "{riskIndicatorType}"
| where entity_type == "{entityType}"
| summarize count() by TimeGenerated, indicator_name
content.title: Risk Indicators Received

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL
| where indicator_type == "{riskIndicatorType}"
| where entity_type == "{entityType}"
| summarize Count = count() by indicator_name
| top 10 by Count desc
content.title: Top 10 Risk Indicators

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_indicatorEventDetails_V1_CL
| join CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL on indicator_uuid
| where indicator_type == "{riskIndicatorType}"
| where entity_type == "{entityType}"
| where country != "NA"
| summarize count() by city, country
content.title: Citrix Analytics Risk Indicator by Geo Location

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| where event_type == "datasourceSPAEventDetails" and entity_type == "user" and isnotempty(user_oid)
| summarize dcount(tolower(user_oid))
content.title: Users

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| where event_type == "datasourceSPAEventDetails" and isnotempty(device_id)
| summarize dcount(tolower(device_id))
content.title: Devices

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| where event_type == "datasourceSPAEventDetails"
| where occurrence_event_type contains "Launch"
| where (isnotempty(app_name) and app_name != "NA") 
    or (isnotempty(saas_app_name) and saas_app_name != "NA")
| where app_name !startswith "NetAccess"
| extend AppName = coalesce(app_name, saas_app_name)
| summarize Count = count() by AppName
content.title: Applications

content.query: CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL | summarize event_cnt=count() by occurrence_event_type, TimeGenerated
content.title: Event Summary

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| summarize count() by event_source
content.title: Event Source

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| summarize count() by event_category
content.title: Event Category

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| where event_type == "datasourceDPSEventDetails"
| summarize count() by policy_result
content.title: Device Posture

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| where event_type == "datasourceSPAEventDetails" and event_category == "App Enumeration"
| summarize count() by event_status
content.title: App Enumeration

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| where event_type == "datasourceSPAEventDetails" and occurrence_event_type contains "Launch"
| extend normalized_status = case(
    isempty(event_status) or event_status in ("NA", "allow"), "Success",
    event_status == "deny", "Deny",
    event_status in ("Failure", "failure"), "Failure",
    event_status  // default: keep original value if none of the above match
)
| summarize count() by normalized_status
content.title: App Launch

content.query:
let userParam = "{user}";
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| where isnotempty(userParam)
| where event_type == "datasourceSPAEventDetails"
| where entity_id contains userParam
| where 
    ("{status}" == "" and event_status in ("Success", "allow", "Failure", "failure")) or
    ("{status}" == "Success" and event_status in ("Success", "allow")) or
    ("{status}" == "Failure" and event_status in ("Failure", "failure")) or
    (event_status == "{status}")
| project user=entity_id, timestamp, operation_type, event_source, event_status, event_description, info_code, transaction_id

let transactionIdParam = "{transactionid}";
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| where isnotempty(transactionIdParam)
| where transaction_id == transactionIdParam
| project user=entity_id,
          transaction_id,
          timestamp,
          event_type=occurrence_event_type,
          category=event_category,
          source=event_source,
          app_name=coalesce(app_name, saas_app_name),
          policy_result,
          status=event_status,
          reason=event_description,
          mode_of_access,
          client_ip

CitrixAnalytics_riskScoreChange_V1_CL
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
| order by TimeGenerated desc 
| project cur_riskscore
| limit 1
content.title: Current Risk Score

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_riskScoreChange_V1_CL
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
| summarize by cur_riskscore, TimeGenerated

CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
| summarize count() by indicator_name
content.title: Risk Indicator (ratio)

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_indicatorEventDetails_V1_CL
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
| where country != "NA"
| project country
content.title: Risk Indicator (Geo Distribution)

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| join CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL on tenant_id, entity_id
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
| where event_type == "userProfileDevice"
| project data_source, indicator_category, indicator_name, device
content.title: Related Devices

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL
| join CitrixAnalytics_indicatorEventDetails_V1_CL on tenant_id, entity_id
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
| project data_source, indicator_category, indicator_name, client_ip
content.title: Related IP's

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| where event_type == "userProfileApp"
| summarize sum(cnt) by app
| take 10
| order by sum_cnt desc
content.title: Top 10 User Applications

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| where event_type == "userProfileDevice"
| summarize sum(cnt) by device
| take 10
| order by sum_cnt desc
content.title: Top 10 User Devices

content.query:
CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| where event_type == "userProfileLocation"
| summarize sum(cnt) by city, country
| take 10
| order by sum_cnt desc
content.title: Top 10 User Locations
